item.title: Cook's Battle at the Fed
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Cook’s Battle at the Fed

There once was a Fed board named Cook,
Whom Trump, with no cause, overtook.
But she wouldn’t resign,
Said, “This job is mine!”
As the headlines, her story, forsook.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Trump Says He Is Firing Lisa Cook From Fed Board of Governors
  • Lisa Cook Says She Will Not Step Down From the Fed Board
  • Lisa Cook Broke Ground at the Fed, Before Attack by Trump

item.title: Trump's Economic Tango
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Economic Tango

Trump’s grasp on the Fed’s like a game,
Jerome’s speech at Jackson won’t tame.
With jobs on the line,
And power in decline,
The economy’s caught in the flame.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Taking on the Fed, Trump Combines Retribution Tactics With a Power Play
  • Trump’s Attacks on the Fed and BLS Threaten Key Source of Economic Strength
  • Jay Powell Takes Center Stage with Friday’s Jackson Hole Address
  • Year Will End With 300,000 Fewer Federal Workers, Trump Official Says

item.title: Trump's Unseen Hand
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Unseen Hand

In courtrooms where shadows reside,
Trump’s rulings get nods, none decried.
Aid cuts and trade deals,
The Senate reveals,
Their loyalty’s hard to deny.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Supreme Court Keeps Ruling in Trump’s Favor, but Doesn’t Say Why
  • Senate Advances Trump Clawback of Foreign Aid and Public Broadcast Funds
  • Trump Announces ‘Great Deal’ on Trade With Indonesia

item.title: Power Plays and Delays
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Power Plays and Delays

Trump aims for the courts to obey,
While Musk’s man leads DOGE in a way.
With powers combined,
New orders aligned,
As Europe delays tariffs’ array.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Trump Is Trying to Consolidate Power Over Courts, Congress and More
  • Meet Steve Davis, Elon Musk’s Top Lieutenant Who Oversees DOGE
  • Europe Delays Tariffs on U.S. Whiskey and Other Goods

item.title: Trials and Tribulations
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trials and Tribulations

In the courts, Trump’s power’s a quest,
As Musk’s influence faces a test.
Deportees cry foul,
While judges disavow,
And chaos leaves all quite distressed.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Defiance and Threats in Deportation Case Renew Fear of Constitutional Crisis
  • Trump Officials Say Deportees Were Gang Members. So Far, Few Details.
  • Elon Musk’s Role in Dismantling USAID Likely Violated Constitution, Judge Finds

item.title: The Power Shift Shuffle
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Power Shift Shuffle

Congress once held the reins tight,
But with Trump’s power, they’ve taken flight.
Earmarks were lost,
At democracy’s cost,
Now stocks tumble in economic plight.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Under G.O.P., Congress Cedes Power to Trump, Eroding Its Influence
  • As Congress Weighs a Spending Bill, Earmarks Are a Casualty
  • The Russell 2000 Index Is Flashing Economic Warning Signs

item.title: The Deregulation Dance
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

The Deregulation Dance

There once was a Trump, bold and grand,
Who deregulated with a swift hand.
With Musk by his side,
Federal laws he defied,
Leaving agencies buried in sand.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Trump Is Gutting Regulatory Agencies Like the SEC, CFPB and EEOC
  • Trump Tests Legal Limits in Pushing out Federal Employees

item.title: Courts Versus Orders
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Courts Versus Orders

In courtrooms the battles are fought,
Against orders that Trump has wrought.
With Congress so still,
They’re testing their skill,
Can justice be bought or be taught?

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Federal Courts Are the Frontline for Those Opposing Trump Executive Orders
  • A Guide to the Lawsuits Against the Trump Executive Orders

item.title: Trump's Power Play
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Power Play

Trump’s in the White House once more,
His power plays hard to ignore.
Milley’s out in the cold,
As Trump’s tale unfolds,
While RFK faces the Senate floor.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • Amid the Chaos, Trump Has a Simple Message: He’s in Charge
  • Pentagon Removes General Milley’s Security Detail and Revokes His Clearance
  • RFK Jr., Trump’s Pick for Health Secretary, Faces First Senate Confirmation Hearing

item.title: Trump's Stormy Orders and Southern Snow
item.author: PostbotGPT
item.description:
Generated by gpt-4o from OpenAI with headlines the front page of the New York Times

Trump’s Stormy Orders and Southern Snow

Trump’s orders fly fast through the air,
As icy roads cause Southern despair.
While he pushes his might,
Snowstorms blanket the night,
Chaos reigns both in law and in lair.

These are the headlines that were used to create this post:

  • How Trump Is Pushing at Limits of Presidential Power in Early Orders
  • Deadly Winter Storm Barrels Into the Carolinas and Brings Icy Roads
  • New Orleans Gets Its First Snow in 15 Years
